name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve StudySage
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. Send message '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots/Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output:

```
Paste logs here
```

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 13.0, Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12.1]
- Poetry version: [e.g. 1.7.1]
- StudySage version: [e.g. v1.1.0]
- Discord.py version: [run `poetry show discord.py`]

## Ollama Setup
- Ollama version: [run `ollama --version`]
- Model used: [e.g. mistral]
- Ollama running: [yes/no]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
